video_summary: Creepy notes frustration → snow foam gun demo + £13 TikTok Shop CTA
detailed_analysis: Hook uses relatable creepy note frustration as pattern interrupt. Switches at 10s to car detailing problem-solution structure. Creamy foam visuals provide instant gratification. Multiple attachment demos build desire. Ends with hard Bottom Funnel CTA: £13 price drop (was £30) + explicit yellow basket pointer. High retention via visual satisfaction and urgency. Click-off risk only if viewers miss the 10s transition.
key_message: This stubby gun attachment makes professional creamy snow foam easy and is now only £13 on TikTok Shop
visual_tactics: Interrupt: abrupt cut from door to car at 10s
Production: gloved hands for ASMR effect

pattern_interrupts: abrupt cut from door to car at 10s

swipe_notes: Open with relatable frustration hook then abrupt cut to product demo
Show thick creamy result close-up before any selling
End with exact old/new price + 'yellow basket down here' gesture for instant commerce trigger

product.name: Cotta Stubby Gun snow foam attachment

transcript_full: Oh I'm getting sick of this now, why do I keep getting these? How do you sexy? Are you really car detailing? Would you be able to fit in me? Can I pay cash or something else? Kiss, kiss, kiss. What? What is everything in my detail? Just because I don't use a bucket and sponge. Or because I don't use my low pressure garden house or does absolutely nothing. Or because I don't use a base car, you're gonna like everybody else. But all because I use this car, just up your gun attachment to make sure a car all creamy just like this. Just look at how creamy it is. And it even cleans with the car to adapt it. So if you have a car to like me, you won't have to buy one. And it has these five different attachments. So you just pop the snow film kind of off like this, sticking your attachment like this. Look at how powerful is this. How you just wash away all the cream just like this. The best part about these is that now 13 pound on the TikTok shop. And they used to be 30 pounds. So if this discount is still live and they're still in stock, there should be a yellow basket somewhere down here.

video_arc.on_screen_text: I’m really getting sick of this 😡
video_arc.viewer_thought: What is this note? Relatable annoyance
video_arc.visual: Hands pick up creepy handwritten note from door
Hands tear note and flip middle finger

video_arc.audio: What is everything in my detail? Just because I don't use a bucket and sponge.
video_arc.viewer_thought: Why is he showing car washing?
video_arc.visual: Cut to car being washed with yellow sponge

video_arc.audio: Or because I don't use my low pressure garden house...
But all because I use this Cotta Stubby Gun attachment...
video_arc.visual: Foam gun spraying thick white foam on car

video_arc.audio: Just look at how creamy it is.
video_arc.visual: Close-up of thick creamy foam on car hood

video_arc.audio: And it has these five different attachments...
video_arc.visual: Hands swapping attachments on colorful gun

video_arc.audio: Look at how powerful is this.
The best part about these is they're now £13 on the TikTok shop...
there should be a yellow basket somewhere down here.
video_arc.visual: Hands point to bottom of screen

video_summary: Creepy notes frustration -> creamy foam gun demo & £13 TikTok shop deal
visual_tactics: extreme close-ups of thick foam dripping
Tension: creepy note build-up before product pivot
Interrupt: sudden cut from door to car wash at 10s
Production: gloved hands for product focus

frame_tactics: extreme close-ups of thick foam dripping
pattern_interrupts: sudden cut from door to car wash at 10s
tension_devices: creepy note build-up before product pivot

watch_time_psychology.click_off_reason: viewers who dislike the note content or don't connect to car detailing
watch_time_psychology.pacing_notes: fast opening, varied mid-section with demos, slower CTA close

why_this_worked.primary_reason: Relatable frustration hook + ultra-satisfying foam visuals + clear price drop urgency
why_this_worked.replication_notes: Use relatable pain-point story (even if unrelated) then pivot to thick creamy product demo + price reveal + yellow basket pointer
